completed_tasks.name: Define v1 REQUIREMENTS.md (24 requirements across 9 categories)

decisions.decision: Horizontal Layers project structure (not vertical MVP slices)
decisions.rationale: User chose horizontal layers for clear layer-by-layer dependency
User chose standard; roadmapper produced 8 phases
User wants to confirm at each step

decisions.decision: v1 scope is trimmed: no guest sighting submission, no geo-notifications, no web push, no admin panel, no vaccinations
decisions.rationale: User scoped down to core display + lost case lifecycle + AI stub + PWA

decisions.decision: Phase 4 cron: stale-case-check and stale-case-close need pg_cron or Vercel Pro (4 daily jobs exceed Hobby tier)
decisions.rationale: Roadmapper flagged this — must resolve before Phase 4 planning

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 1 to plan the Foundation phase (Next.js setup, Supabase config, Prisma migration, CI/CD scaffold)
context_notes: Project fully initialized. spec.md is authoritative. schema.prisma already has all tables including push_subscriptions, stale_closed enum, pgvector. No app code exists — greenfield. 24 v1 requirements across 8 phases. Phase 7 (Health) depends on Phase 3, not Phase 6 — can be planned in parallel with Phase 6.
